subject: Status check — where are you?
body:
Fulton — Quinn checking in. Quick status request:

1. CALBEAF-119 (A2 Estonia + ~20 countries) — any progress or blockers?
2. CALBEAF-120 (B1-AU 9 cities) — started? Waiting on AIDI?
3. CALBEAF-147 (.gitignore footgun) — filed, any action needed from me?
4. SEO blurbs (v1.29.2 TEST) — anything to flag before Sarah signs off?
5. Layer 3 regression snapshot — your compliance was first in (nice). Any gaps found?

Also: Toby asked for a general team status sweep. Where are you overall, and anything waiting on me or Toby?

— Quinn
